auth.signupCheckEmail: Account created! Please check your email for a confirmation link.
auth.signupEmailExists: An account with this email already exists. Please log in instead.
auth.agreeToPrivacy: By using LangAlpha, you agree to our <1>Privacy Policy</1>.

settings.title: User Settings
settings.voiceInputDesc: Enable microphone icon in the chat bar for speech-to-text.
settings.logoutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.preferencesDesc: Preferences are managed through conversation with the agent. Use the button below to update them.
settings.noPreferencesYet: No preferences set yet. Use the button below to set up your profile.
settings.resetConfirmMsg: This will clear all your preferences (risk tolerance, investment style, agent settings). You can set them up again anytime via the agent. Are you sure?
settings.completeProfileDesc: Set up your stocks, risk tolerance, and preferences through a quick conversation.
settings.defaultModelDesc: Used for workspace conversations (code execution, sandbox).
settings.flashModelDesc: Used for quick queries without sandbox (web search, market data).
settings.byokDesc: Provide your own API keys to bypass credit limits.
settings.byokTooltip: Your API keys are stored using AES encryption and are never visible in plaintext. If you choose to delete a key, it is permanently removed from our records.
settings.parentProviderDesc: Inherits SDK and settings from the parent provider.
settings.providerNameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores allowed
settings.customModelsDesc: Define custom model entries to use with your BYOK API keys.
settings.customModelNameInvalid: Name must start with alphanumeric, max 63 chars, only .-_ allowed
settings.customModelProviderNoKey: No API key configured for provider "{{provider}}". Add a BYOK key first.
settings.connectedAccountsDesc: Connect external accounts to use models through your existing subscriptions.
settings.codexDesc: Use Codex models with your ChatGPT subscription
settings.codexStep1Desc: A new tab will open to OpenAI's authorization page. Log in with your ChatGPT account.
settings.codexStep2Desc: A short code (e.g. ABCD-EFGH) will appear right here. Copy it and enter it on the OpenAI page to authorize access.
settings.codexStep3Desc: Once approved, we'll automatically detect it and connect your account. No copy-pasting needed.
settings.codexSecurityDesc: Your OAuth tokens are encrypted at rest (AES-256 via pgp_sym_encrypt) and only decrypted when making API calls on your behalf. We never store your OpenAI password. Tokens can be revoked at any time by disconnecting.
settings.codexDisclaimerDesc: Ginlix is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI. By proceeding, you connect your ChatGPT subscription at your own discretion and responsibility. Usage is subject to OpenAI's Terms of Service.
settings.codexTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
settings.codexFlowFailed: Failed to start Codex device code flow
settings.claudeDesc: Use Claude models with your Anthropic subscription
settings.claudeStep1Desc: A new tab will open to claude.ai where you sign in and authorize access.
settings.claudeStep2Desc: After approval, you'll see a code on the page. Copy the entire value.
settings.claudeStep3Desc: Paste the code into the input field to complete the connection.
settings.claudeSecurityDesc: Your tokens are encrypted at rest (AES-256 via pgp_sym_encrypt) and only decrypted when making API calls on your behalf. Tokens can be revoked at any time by disconnecting.
settings.claudeDisclaimerDesc: Ginlix is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. By proceeding, you connect your Anthropic subscription at your own discretion and responsibility. Usage is subject to Anthropic's Terms of Service.
settings.claudePastePrompt: After authorizing on claude.ai, paste the code shown on the page below:
settings.claudePasteError: Failed to exchange code. Please try again.
settings.starredModelsDesc: Starred models appear in the chat input for quick switching
settings.compactionProfileDesc: Bundled preset for compaction trigger and retention. Leave on system default unless you have a reason to tune it.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Compact early. Safe for any model; summaries may feel more frequent.

extended.label: Extended
extended.description: Preserve more context. Best for 400k–1M context models.

dashboard.title: LangAlpha
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol or company name...
dashboard.contactMessage: If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us through the following methods
dashboard.prefIncompleteMsg: Your preference information is not complete. Please complete your preferences to get the best experience with the agent.
dashboard.failedOnboarding: Failed to set up onboarding. Please try again.
dashboard.failedPrefUpdate: Failed to start preference update. Please try again.
dashboard.personalizeDesc: Chat with our agent to customize watchlists, risk preferences, and alerts

shell.resetMessage: This replaces your current widgets and layout with the default preset. This action can't be undone.

frame.addToContextTitle: Add this widget to chat context
frame.contextUnavailableHint: This widget has not registered a context exporter yet.
frame.addRowToContextTitle: Add this row to chat context
frame.contextUnsupportedTradingView: Can't attach this — the content is managed by TradingView, so the agent can't access it.

addDialog.title: Add a widget
addDialog.tipBody: Click a widget to drop it at the next open slot on your dashboard.
addDialog.hintAddSentence: Click to select · double-click or <enter></enter> to add

category.marketsBlurb: Real-time quotes, indices, charts and calendars.
category.intelligenceBlurb: AI-generated briefs and curated news streams.
category.agentBlurb: Kick off a research session from the dashboard.
category.workspaceBlurb: Jump into a past conversation or workspace.

presetsDialog.title: Start with a preset
presetsDialog.description: Six curated layouts tuned to different workflows. Pick one to start, then rearrange and swap widgets freely. Your existing layout is saved and can be restored.

embedFallback.title: Widget unavailable
embedFallback.body: TradingView didn't load. Check your network or ad-blocker.

morningBrief.name: Morning Brief
morningBrief.description: The first five minutes of your day. AI Daily Brief anchors the canvas; market news, earnings, and your portfolio + watchlist sit one glance away.
morningBrief.bestFor: Opening the app once a day and wanting the full picture.

agentDesk.name: Agent Desk
agentDesk.description: The agent's working surface. A full-width ask console anchors the top — put a question on the table, then read today's AI brief beneath. Workspaces, recent threads, automations, and your book round out the desk.
agentDesk.bestFor: Living next to the agent — reading, asking, running automations, jumping across workspaces.

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.description: Deep qualitative work. The ask console leads; a tall market news rail keeps sources in view. AI brief, holdings + watchlist, and a 2-week earnings calendar round out the canvas.
researcher.bestFor: Writing memos, running deep-dives, chasing citations.

trader.name: Trader
trader.description: Multi-timeframe workstation. A 2×2 chart grid reads the same symbol at four zoom levels — short-horizon candles over long-horizon area views and a benchmark. Portfolio + watchlist and a wide news tape close the canvas.
trader.bestFor: Reading one symbol deeply across horizons with context in view.

traderTv.name: Trader (TV)
traderTv.description: A TradingView-driven trading desk. Ticker tape anchors the top, stock heatmap as hero, symbol spotlight with market movers alongside, economic events + a technical analysis gauge below, and a native mini-chart grid closes the canvas.
traderTv.bestFor: Tape-to-sector-to-symbol scan, with TV-native interactivity inside each card.

portfolioSteward.name: Portfolio Steward
portfolioSteward.description: Your book, actively tended. Your top holding's chart anchors the canvas alongside the combined portfolio + watchlist; a portfolio-filtered news rail runs tall on the right. Ask console and recent threads sit below for when you need to dig in.
portfolioSteward.bestFor: Tending a concentrated book and asking questions about positions.

tickerTape.title: Ticker Tape
tickerTape.description: Scrolling real-time quotes across your chosen symbols.
tickerTape.symbolsHelper: Use TradingView's exchange-qualified form (e.g. NASDAQ:NVDA) for best results.

stockHeatmap.title: Stock Heatmap
stockHeatmap.description: Sector-grouped treemap sized by market cap, colored by % change.

cryptoHeatmap.title: Crypto Heatmap
cryptoHeatmap.description: Crypto treemap sized by market cap, colored by performance.

forexHeatmap.title: Forex Cross Rates
forexHeatmap.description: Major-currency cross-rate grid with live spreads.
forexHeatmap.info: Shows cross-rates for major currencies. The currency set is fixed by TradingView in this widget.

etfHeatmap.title: ETF Heatmap
etfHeatmap.description: Treemap of ETFs sized by AUM, colored by performance.

economicEvents.title: Economic Calendar
economicEvents.description: Upcoming releases (CPI, NFP, FOMC, etc.) filtered by importance.

economicMap.title: Economic Map
economicMap.description: World map of economic indicators (GDP, inflation, interest rates) by country.

technicals.title: Technical Analysis
technicals.description: Oscillator + moving-average consensus gauge with buy/sell/neutral verdict.

movers.title: Market Movers
movers.description: Top gainers / losers / most-active across US exchanges.

symbolSpotlight.title: Symbol Spotlight
symbolSpotlight.description: Price + chart overview with key stats for a single symbol.

singleTicker.title: Single Ticker
singleTicker.description: Compact live-price card for one symbol.

symbolInfo.title: Symbol Info
symbolInfo.description: Compact summary card — price, day range, market cap, volume.

companyProfile.title: Company Profile
companyProfile.description: Business description, sector, industry, and HQ for a single company.

companyFinancials.title: Company Financials
companyFinancials.description: Fundamentals — income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, key ratios.

stockScreener.title: Stock Screener
stockScreener.description: Filter the full stock universe by price, market cap, technicals, fundamentals.

cryptoScreener.title: Crypto Screener
cryptoScreener.description: Filter the crypto universe by market cap, performance, technicals.

topStories.title: Top Stories
topStories.description: Market headlines from TradingView — by market or pinned to a single symbol.

marketsOverview.title: Markets Overview
marketsOverview.description: Live tiles for major indices with sparklines.

insightBrief.title: AI Daily Brief
insightBrief.description: Auto-generated market insight with a "Read Full Brief" CTA.

newsFeed.title: News Feed
newsFeed.description: Market / Portfolio / Watchlist news with ticker + time filters.

earningsCalendar.title: Earnings Calendar
earningsCalendar.description: Upcoming earnings, grouped by Today / Tomorrow / This week / Next week.
earningsCalendar.emptyHint: Nothing scheduled in the next {{days}} days.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.description: Compact ticker list with live prices.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Your holdings with market value and unrealized P/L.

portfolioWatchlist.title: Portfolio + Watchlist
portfolioWatchlist.description: Combined holdings and watchlist with a Watch / Holdings tab switcher.

miniChartGrid.title: Mini Chart Grid
miniChartGrid.description: Sparkline grid across multiple symbols — 30-day trend at a glance.

chart.title: Price Chart
chart.description: Candlestick, area, or line chart for any symbol.
chart.noMatchesEnter: No matches. Press Enter to use "{{symbol}}".

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Scheduled runs with next-run times and quick pause / resume / trigger.

conversation.title: Workbench
conversation.description: A chat-first console: greeting, live chat input, and one-click resume.
conversation.placeholder: Put LangAlpha to work — a ticker to unpack, a filing to parse, a thesis to stress-test…

recentThreads.title: Recent Threads
recentThreads.emptyHint: Start a conversation to fill this log.

brief.generateTooltip: Generate a personalized market brief based on your watchlist and portfolio holdings

errors.generationFailed: Brief generation failed. Please try again.
errors.timeout: Generation timed out. Please try again later.
errors.alreadyGenerating: Brief is already being generated. Try again in a moment.
errors.creditLimit: Credit limit reached. Upgrade to generate more briefs.
errors.generic: Failed to generate brief. Please try again.

addWatchlistDialog.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol or company name...
addWatchlistDialog.alertPriceAboveBelow: Price above must be greater than price below.

addPortfolioDialog.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol or company name...
addPortfolioDialog.alertQuantityInvalid: Please enter a valid quantity greater than 0.
addPortfolioDialog.alertAverageCostInvalid: Please enter a valid average cost greater than 0.

chatInputCard.placeholderDesktop: Ask AI about market trends, specific stocks, or portfolio analysis...

networkBanner.offlineMessage: Network offline — dashboard data may be stale until you reconnect.

newsFeedCard.emptyPortfolio: Add stocks to your portfolio to see relevant news here
newsFeedCard.emptyWatchlist: Add stocks to your watchlist to see relevant news here

topNews.title: Top News
topNews.sample1: Retail Sales Slump Takes Toll on Market,...
topNews.sample2: Tech Giant's Earnings Soar, Stock Hits All-Ti...
topNews.sample3: High-Profile IPO Falls Short of Expectations...
topNews.sample4: Electric Vehicle Stocks Skyrocket as Deman...

topResearch.title: Top Research
topResearch.sample1: Retail Sales Slump Takes Toll on Market, Stocks Dip

workspace.welcomeDesc: Get started by setting up your preferences or creating a workspace.
workspace.failedLoadWorkspaces: Failed to load workspaces. Please refresh the page.
workspace.failedDeleteWorkspace: Failed to delete workspace. Please try again.
workspace.filesUploadNote: Uploaded after workspace is created · 50 MB max per file
workspace.descModeAgentHint: The agent will set up the workspace description from your first conversation

thread.startConversation: Start a conversation to create your first thread
thread.failedLoadThreads: Failed to load threads. Please refresh the page.
thread.failedDeleteThread: Failed to delete thread. Please try again.
thread.failedRenameThread: Failed to rename thread. Please try again.

share.anyoneWithLink: Anyone with this link can view the conversation.

chat.planFeedbackHint: Type your feedback to revise the plan, then send.
chat.interruptedHint: Agent interrupted. Feel free to provide new instructions.
chat.errorUpstreamHeadline: The model provider returned an error
chat.errorUpstreamHeadlineStatus: The model provider returned an error ({{status}})
chat.errorInternalHeadline: Something went wrong on our end
chat.errorHintApiKey: Check that your API key is correct and hasn't been revoked.
chat.errorHintModelAccess: Confirm your plan or subscription allows access to this model.
chat.errorHintProviderStatus: Check the provider's status page for ongoing incidents.
chat.errorHintTryAnotherModel: Try switching to a different model in the model picker.
chat.accessDeniedTitle: You don't have access to this conversation
chat.accessDeniedDesc: Ask the owner to share the conversation to view it.
chat.workspaceRestoring: Restoring workspace from storage, this usually takes about 60 seconds...
chat.workspaceStateHelp: Why is this taking a while?
chat.workspaceStateStartingBody: Your sandbox is being reconnected. It typically takes a few seconds. Your files and conversation history are preserved.
chat.workspaceStateArchivedBody: Sandboxes that sit idle for 7 days are archived to free compute. Bringing one back involves downloading the snapshot and rebooting the container, which usually takes 60 to 90 seconds.
chat.workspaceStateArchivedFootnote: Your files, tools, and conversation state are intact — you'll be able to chat as soon as the sandbox is ready.
chat.placeholderPendingRejection: Describe how to revise the plan...
chat.placeholderInterrupted: Send new instructions to the agent...
chat.placeholderLoading: Type a follow-up to steer the agent...
chat.placeholderSubagentsRunning: Workers still running. Send a message or click a worker to instruct it.

slashCommand.subagentDesc: Use subagents to complete this task
slashCommand.compactDesc: Compact conversation context to free up token space
slashCommand.offloadDesc: Offload large tool arguments to sandbox filesystem
slashCommand.comps-analysisDesc: Comparable company analysis: operating metrics, valuation multiples, peer benchmarking
slashCommand.dcf-modelDesc: DCF valuation: free cash flow projections, WACC, terminal value, sensitivity analysis
slashCommand.earnings-previewDesc: Pre-earnings analysis: consensus estimates, key metrics to watch, bull/base/bear scenarios
slashCommand.idea-generationDesc: Stock screening and idea generation: quantitative screens, thematic analysis, shortlist
slashCommand.check-modelDesc: Financial model audit: structural checks, formula validation, integrity testing
slashCommand.morning-noteDesc: Daily research briefing: overnight news, pre-market movers, earnings, macro events
slashCommand.catalyst-calendarDesc: Event tracker: earnings dates, economic releases, conferences, regulatory events
slashCommand.check-deckDesc: Investment deck QC: number consistency, data-narrative alignment, IB language, formatting audit
slashCommand.thesis-trackerDesc: Investment thesis scorecard: track pillars, risks, catalysts, and conviction over time
slashCommand.model-updateDesc: Update financial model with new quarterly actuals, revised estimates, and updated price target
slashCommand.3-statement-modelDesc: Integrated 3-statement financial model: linked income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow
slashCommand.earnings-analysisDesc: Post-earnings analysis report: beat/miss breakdown, estimate revisions, thesis impact, charts
slashCommand.sector-overviewDesc: Industry landscape report: market size, competitive dynamics, company profiles, valuation context
slashCommand.competitive-analysisDesc: Competitive landscape analysis: positioning, scorecards, moat assessment, market share trends
slashCommand.initiating-coverageDesc: Full equity research initiation: company research, financial model, valuation, charts, 30-50 page report
slashCommand.report-issueDesc: Report issues and propose fixes to improve agent capabilities

chat.compactBusy: Can only compact when the current turn has finished streaming.

modelSelector.incompatibleSdk: Cannot switch to this model in the current session (different provider)

filePanel.editingHint: Editing — changes are not saved until you press Save
filePanel.discardUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
filePanel.confirmSave: Save changes? This will overwrite the file in the sandbox and cannot be undone.
filePanel.fileTooLarge: File is too large to edit in the browser (>500KB)
filePanel.loadEditFailed: Failed to load file for editing
filePanel.exportLoadError: Could not load full content. Export may be incomplete.

memoBanner.stale: In memo — workspace version differs from the saved memo.
memoBanner.diffSubtitle: Left: saved memo. Right: current workspace file.

error.notFoundHint: The file path may be incorrect, or the file has been deleted.
error.notBackedUpHint: This file may not have been saved before the workspace stopped. Start the workspace to check the sandbox.
error.sandboxStartingHint: The sandbox is still initializing. Please try again shortly.
error.sandboxUnavailableHint: The sandbox is not available. Start the workspace to access files.
error.binaryFileHint: This file type cannot be displayed in the browser, but you can download it.
error.noSandboxHint: Flash mode workspaces do not have file storage.
error.accessDeniedHint: This file is outside the allowed directories.
error.unknownHint: An unexpected error occurred while loading the file.

memoryPanel.emptyHint: The agent will create memory.md when it has something worth remembering.
memoryPanel.notFound: Entry "{{key}}" no longer exists. Showing all entries.

memoPanel.title: Memos
memoPanel.description: Upload research memos, source documents, and reference material. Stored per user — the agent can read them across any workspace.
memoPanel.uploadHint: Markdown, TXT, CSV, JSON, or PDF · up to 5 MB
memoPanel.unsavedDiscardConfirm: You have unsaved memo edits. Discard them?

empty.title: No memos yet
empty.hint: Drop a file here or click Upload to add your first memo.

errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large ({{size}} MB). Maximum is 5 MB.

memoPanel.notFound: Memo "{{key}}" no longer exists. Showing all memos.

confirm.deleteBody: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulkDeleteBody: Permanently delete {{count}} memo(s)? This cannot be undone.

memoPanel.metadataFailed: Metadata generation failed. Click Regenerate to retry.
memoPanel.pdfFallback: Your browser cannot display this PDF inline.

automation.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
automation.cronHelp: 5-field cron: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week
automation.workspaceRequired: PTC mode requires a workspace. Please select one.
automation.cooldownHint: Min 4 hours (240 min). Leave empty for once per trading day.
automation.noAutomationsHint: No automations yet. Select a template above to get started.
automation.templatePriceAlertDesc: Get notified and analyzed when a stock hits your price target
automation.templateMorningBriefingDesc: Daily pre-market overview delivered before the bell

toolArtifact.no8KFilings: No 8-K filings found in the last {{days}} days.
toolArtifact.resultTooLarge: Result too large to display inline

setup.securityNote: Your API keys are encrypted and never shared
setup.methodTitle: How would you like to connect?
setup.methodSubtitle: Choose how you'll access AI models. You can add more providers later.
setup.methodOAuthDesc: Connect via OAuth. No API key needed.
setup.methodLocalDesc: Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, or other local inference servers.
setup.addAnotherDescription: You can connect multiple providers for more model options.
setup.defaultsSubtitle: Pick the models that power your research
setup.explainerDeep: PTC Mode (Primary): The full agent with a sandboxed environment for code execution, charts, and data analysis. Powered by your primary model.
setup.explainerFlash: Flash Mode: A lightweight agent for quick answers without a sandbox. Powered by your flash model for speed.
setup.doneSummary: Your AI research assistant is configured and ready to go.
setup.addMoreProviders: Connect an additional provider for more model options.
setup.invitationRedeemed: Invitation redeemed. You can configure models now or add a provider.
setup.invitationErrorExpired: This code has expired or been fully used.
setup.invitationErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
setup.providerSubtitleOAuth: Select the subscription you want to connect.
setup.providerSubtitleApiKey: Select the provider you have an API key for.
setup.noProviders: No providers available for this method.
setup.customProviderDesc: Any OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini compatible endpoint
setup.tokensEncrypted: Your tokens are encrypted at rest. We use them only to make API calls on your behalf.
setup.usageCountsClaude: Usage will count against your Anthropic subscription. You can disconnect at any time.
setup.usageCountsOpenai: Usage will count against your OpenAI subscription. You can disconnect at any time.
setup.addModelToDesc: Add another model to your existing custom provider.
setup.modelIdHint: Model ID is sent to the API. Leave same as name if unsure.
setup.addCustomProviderDesc: Connect any OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini compatible endpoint.
setup.oauthCodexDesc: Authorize with your ChatGPT account using a device code.
setup.oauthClaudeDesc: Connect your Claude subscription via OAuth.
setup.codexStep1Desc: A new tab will open to OpenAI's device authorization page.
setup.codexStep2Desc: We'll generate a code for you. Copy it and paste it on OpenAI's page, then approve access.
setup.codexStep3Desc: Once approved, we'll detect it automatically and complete the connection.
setup.claudeStep1Desc: A new tab will open to claude.ai where you sign in and authorize access.
setup.claudeStep2Desc: After approval, you'll see a code on the page. Copy the entire value.
setup.claudeStep3Desc: Return to this tab and paste the code into the input field to complete the connection.
setup.oauthAgreeAnthropic: I understand that usage will count against my Anthropic subscription and that my tokens will be stored encrypted on this platform.
setup.oauthAgreeOpenai: I understand that usage will count against my OpenAI subscription and that my tokens will be stored encrypted on this platform.
setup.enterCodeOnOpenai: Enter this code on the OpenAI page
setup.pasteAuthCode: Paste the authorization code from claude.ai
setup.pasteAuthCodeHint: After authorizing, you'll see a code on the Claude page. Copy and paste it below.
setup.localServerDesc: Configure your local server URL. API key is optional.
setup.codingPlanDesc: Enter the API key from your coding plan subscription.
setup.apiKeyInputDesc: Enter your API key. You can find this in your provider dashboard.
setup.errorNoBaseUrl: Please enter the base URL for your local server.
setup.errorAuthTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
setup.errorDeviceAuth: Failed to start device authorization. Please try again.
setup.errorClaudeOAuth: Failed to initiate Claude OAuth. Please try again.
setup.errorInvalidCode: Invalid authorization code. Please try again.
setup.chooseModels: Select which {{provider}} models to add to your configured model list.
setup.chooseModelsGeneric: Select which models to add to your configured model list.
setup.modelAccessReminder: Make sure your API key or plan has access to the models you select. Models your key does not cover will fail at runtime.
setup.customModelNamePlaceholder: How this model appears in menus (e.g. glm-5.1)
setup.customModelNameSlugEmpty: Add letters or numbers — spaces and symbols will be stripped.
setup.customModelIdPlaceholder: What the provider expects (leave blank to use display name)
setup.customModelIdHint: Sent to the provider's API. Leave empty to use the display name.
setup.chooseYourModelsDesc: Select which models to use for deep research and quick answers. You can change these anytime.
